---
title: "NMFS Openscapes Mentor Community"
---

Starting in 2021, we have been growing an informal cross-NMFS mentor community; each science center and regional office participating in the Openscapes cohorts has 1-4 mentors that help organize the local cohorts, spearhead communication with with their local leadership, act as a point-person for interested local staff, help identify local needs, and help communicate, or potentially organize, teaching resources for their local staff. Openscapes organizes training and co-working sessions for the mentor group, so that we can all learn from each others experiences and learn new skills together.

FY24 will kick off our formal Openscapes mentors cohort for the fiscal year. The mentors cohort will help guide the Open Data/Open Science/Reproducibility efforts for their FMC and act as mentors for Champions cohorts. The mentors cohort will act as the "Open Science leadership team" for NOAA Fisheries. Participation is year-long and will include leadership and mentoring training. The mentor group is modeled after the [NASA Openscapes Framework approach](https://openscapes.github.io/approach-guide/mentors-framework).

## Activities

See our current and previous [activities](activities.qmd)!

## Mentors

Co-leads:

-   Julie Lowndes and Stefanie Butland (Openscapes)
-   Eli Holmes (NOAA Fisheries)

### FY24 Mentors 

Anna Abelman, AFSC
Yvonne Barkley, PIFSC
Jennifer Bigman, AFSC
Amanda Bradford, PIFSC
Jon Brodziak, PIFSC
Lynn deWitt, SWFSC
Monica Diaz, NWFSC
Kathryn Doering, OST
Brian Fadely, AFSC
Craig Faunce, AFSC
Carissa Gervasi, SWFSC
Matt Grossi, SEFSC
Laura Gruenburg, NEFSC
Elizabeth Gugliotti, OST
Shannon Hennessey, AFSC
Eli Holmes, NWFSC
Kristin Holsman, AFSC
Sunny Hospital, SWFSC/PIFSC
Devin Johnson, PIFSC
Andrew Jones, NEFSC
Stacie Koslovsky, AFSC
Josh London, AFSC
Lori Luers, PIFSC
Em Markowitz, AFSC
Michael Marsik, PIFSC
Craig Millard, AKRO
Hem Nalini Mozaria-Luna, NWFSC
Meg Oshima, PIFSC
Jonathan Richar, AFSC
Adyan Rios, SEFSC
Dale Robinson, SWFSC
Julie Rose, NEFSC
Eva Schemmel, PIFSC
Megsie Siple, AFSC
Christine Stawitz, OST
Erin Steiner, NWFSC
Molly Stevens, SEFSC
Kevin Stierhoff, SWFSC
Ana Vaz, SEFSC
Juliette Verstaen, PIFSC
Eric Ward, NWFSC
Lee Weinberger, SEFSC
Ben Williams, AFSC
Phoebe Woodworth-Jefcoats, PIFSC

### FY23 Mentors

-   AFSC: Emily Markowitz, Josh London, Megsie Siple
-   AKRO: Craig Millard
-   NEFSC: Andy Jones, Scott Large
-   NWFSC: Eli Holmes, Eric Ward, Erin Steiner
-   PIFSC: Amanda Bradford, Juliette Verstaen
-   SEFSC: Adyan Rios, Molly Stevens
-   SWFSC: Kevin Stierhoff
-   OST: Christine Stawitz, Kathryn Doering
